final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand color + secondary color + typography specification showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand, capturing the poetic stillness of autumn's fleeting moments.

Style/medium: brand identity specification sheet with the meditative restraint of East Asian design philosophy, the warmth of autumn's golden hour captured in paper and ink
Composition: three-panel horizontal layout — primary color swatch on left, secondary palette in center, typography specimen on right, generous breathing room between elements
Subject: brand color system for 染秋 (RAN QIU) autumn fragrance house: primary color drawn from osmanthus honey and amber warmth, secondary palette evoking persimmon frost, maple leaf crimson, and oolong tea smoke
Scene/backdrop: textured paper surface with subtle grain, the quiet space of a design studio afternoon
Lighting/mood: the golden stillness of late autumn afternoon, warm light filtering through osmanthus branches
Color palette: primary — warm amber gold with honeyed depth; secondary — persimmon frost cream, maple crimson, oolong tea brown, sandalwood shadow; all colors in quiet conversation like autumn leaves settling
Materials/textures: uncoated paper stock with visible fiber, the matte honesty of traditional craftsmanship
Text (verbatim): 染秋 (RAN QIU) / 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Constraints: all color swatches labeled with CMYK and Pantone values, typography specimen shows Chinese and Latin character sets, clean hierarchy between primary and secondary information
Avoid: oversaturated neon tones, Western autumn clichés (pumpkin spice aesthetic), glossy reflective surfaces, decorative elements that compete with the color system
